purpose: Machine-checkable design and promotion gate for the file-storage admin preview, download and audit experience without changing the object storage port.

approvedDesignBrief.zh: 在 files 通用资源路由内扩展文件体验，不新增独立文件管理器；桌面使用表格和右侧抽屉，移动端使用文件卡片和抽屉；抽屉包含元数据、预览、审计；上传、预览、下载和删除全部走平台 API 与通用组件。
approvedDesignBrief.en: Extend the files generic resource route instead of creating a standalone file manager. Desktop uses table plus right drawer, mobile uses file cards plus drawer. The drawer includes metadata, preview and audit. Upload, preview, download and delete use platform APIs and shared components.

screenshots.label: desktop files list with preview drawer
assertions: text preview renders through authenticated blob fetch

screenshots.label: desktop files audit panel
assertions: audit tab is visible in the drawer
audit-log resource absence degrades to declared file operation events
no global error notification is shown

screenshots.label: mobile files card and pagination
assertions: mobile file card replaces the table before pagination
pagination remains below the card list
file icon, name, mime type, size and status fit without overlap

screenshots.label: mobile files preview drawer
assertions: drawer opens from the mobile file card

runtimeChecks: Demo login opened /files and uploaded platform-preview.txt through the hidden file input path.
Current navigation console errors and warnings: none.
Current navigation fetch/xhr requests returned 200, including /api/admin/files/:id/content.
Audit-log queries are skipped when /audit-logs is not exposed in the current resource list.

responsiveRequirements: compact operation bar aligned with PlatformDataTable

auditFallback.zh: 当当前菜单/资源清单未暴露 audit-logs 时，审计 tab 不发起无效请求，展示 file.upload、file.content、file.delete 声明事件；审计资源接入后自动查询真实时间线。
auditFallback.en: When audit-logs is not exposed by the current menu/resource list, the audit tab avoids invalid requests and shows declared file.upload, file.content and file.delete events. Once the audit resource is connected, it queries and shows the real timeline.

mobile files card and preview flow
